ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop (e.g., Nepali Local, Chinese) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Growing season of the crop */,
  "yield_per_hectare" REAL /* Yield per hectare of the crop */,
  "average_growth_period" INTEGER /* Average growth period in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the data was collected */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being produced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of production */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income from sales */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit from sales */,
  "benefit_cost_ratio" REAL /* Benefit cost ratio of the crop */,
  "area_cultivated" REAL /* Area cultivated for the crop in hectares */,
  "input_costs" REAL /* Total input costs */,
  "output_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of output produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmgate_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop */,
  "farmgate_price" REAL /* Farmgate price of the crop */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farmgate_prices_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ministry official, researcher, farmer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analytics data */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of production */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income from sales */,
  "average_profit" REAL /* Average profit from sales */,
  "average_benefit_cost_ratio" REAL /* Average benefit cost ratio of the crop */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Textual analysis of trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics record */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
